feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Check number is not updating in Assignment filed of Gl line items
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are facing a challenge while reconciling the bank with the General Ledger (GL). The check number is not being updated in the Assignment field of the GL line item, which is making the reconciliation process difficult.

I could not find any relevant SAP Notes or documentation in SAP S/4HANA Cloud that explains how to populate the check number in the Assignment field.

Could you please let us know if there is a standard way to achieve this or if any configuration or enhancement is required?

Thank you for your support.

Regards,

Inthiyaz Shaik

entry.title: Incorrect VAT reporting date transferred from SD to FI in Public Cloud
entry.content:
We are experiencing issues with the derivation of the Tax Reporting Date in accounting documents generated from SD billing documents in the Hungarian localization of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2602.

According to the SAP documentation, the Tax Reporting Date and Tax Fulfilment Date can be derived via the configuration activity Define Derivation Rules for Business Transactions.

We found several scenarios in which the standard logic seems to produce incorrect dates.

1. Cancellation invoice

The derivation rule for normal invoices (OINV) is configured to use the fulfilment date for both tax dates. A normal invoice is created with a service rendered date of 30 June and cancelled on 7 July.

The generated FI document receives a Tax Reporting Date of 30 June, while according to Hungarian legislation we would expect the cancellation posting date (7 July).

Invoice date problem.docx

2. Collective invoice

For collective invoices, Hungarian regulations require both the Tax Reporting Date and the Tax Fulfilment Date to be derived from the latest fulfilment date among the referenced deliveries.

However, our debugging indicates that the fulfilment date is determined by class CL_FULFILLDATE_SERVICE, while the VAT date is determined by BAdI implementation CL_IM_IM_FULFILLMENT_ACC. In our tests, one date is taken from the first invoice item and the other from the last invoice item.

Invoice date problem.docx

3. Final invoice with down payment

For a final invoice containing a down-payment clearing item, the system seems to use the derivation rule maintained for OPERIO, although the business process is not a periodic settlement.

In our example, the final invoice receives:

  • Tax Reporting Date: 30.06.2026
  • Tax Fulfilment Date: 08.09.2026

while both dates should be 10.07.2026 according to our understanding of Hungarian VAT rules.

Invoice date problem.docx

Questions

  • Has anyone encountered similar behavior in the Hungarian localization of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
  • Is this the intended standard behavior, or is it considered a defect?
  • Are there SAP Notes or recommended configuration settings that address these scenarios?
  • Is there any official guidance regarding the legal interpretation of these invoice types in Hungary?

entry.title: API_MRP_MATERIALS_SRV_01
entry.content: Hello,In S/4HANA Public Cloud, I need to retrieve Material Planning data and consume it in a custom BTP application intended for deployment in the public cloud.While researching the available options, I identified the following API as the appropriate one for this use case:Plain TextAPI_MRP_MATERIALS_SRV_01I was able to successfully retrieve the data using Postman. However, when I added this service to the manifest.json file of the BTP app project and attempted to deploy the app, I encountered an error stating that the usage of this service is forbidden in this context.Based on my investigation, the issue appears to be that this service is configured as an inbound service, whereas my intended use case requires it to be configured as outbound.Could you please advise on the following:Is there a way to resolve this error and correctly enable outbound usage of this service?Alternatively, is there a released Data Definition (e.g., a CDS view or equivalent API) that exposes the same Material Planning data and supports outbound consumption?Thank you in advance for your help.Best regards,

entry.title: Commodity Code values not displayed in CDS view I_PURCHASEORDERITEMAPI01
entry.content: The commodity code values from purchase orders are not displayed in CDS view I_PURCHASEORDERITEMAPI01.

entry.title: "Amount in Global Currency" field with ZERO value
entry.content:
While reporting on journal entries transactions, the "amount in global currency" field returns zero value.


--- Steps to Reproduce ---

  1. Open "Display Line Items in General Ledger " App
  2. Some Transactions return a Zero Value in the "Amount in Global Currency" field.

entry.title: Unable to edit highest fiscal period to 2027 from 2027 from ledger setting
entry.content: Unable to change highest fiscal period from ledger setting. How this fiscal year can edited to 2026 from 2027?

entry.title: Sap - Procurement
entry.content: Does anyone knows how to get the sap live practice system that looks the same but it like the testing system before going live?

entry.title: Successor of Run Balance Interest Calculation (T-Code F.52) for G/L in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.
entry.content:
We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and require clarification regarding Balance Interest Calculation for G/L Accounts.

In SAP S/4HANA Private Edition / On-Premise, transaction F.52 (Balance Interest Calculation) was available to calculate interest on G/L account balances, which was commonly used for calculating Running Finance / Running Markup on financing accounts.

We would like to ask the following:

  1. What is the standard alternative to Transaction F.52 in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
  2. Has this functionality been replaced by another Fiori application, background job, or standard process?
  3. If there is no direct replacement, what is the SAP-recommended approach for calculating Running Finance (interest/markup on G/L balances) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
  4. Does SAP recommend using any standard functionality from Treasury, Bank Account Interest Management, or another component for this business requirement?
  5. If this functionality is not available in the standard Public Cloud solution, is there any recommended extensibility approach or best practice that SAP suggests?

Our business requirement is to calculate periodic financing charges (running finance/markup) based on the outstanding balance of a G/L account.

We would appreciate your guidance on the recommended standard solution and SAP best practices for this requirement in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Thank you for your support.

Kind regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: 如何通过加密厂商北京前沿信安科技股份有限公司的前置Proxy登陆S4 Public Cloud
entry.content: 咨询如何通过加密厂商 北京前沿信安科技股份有限公司 的前置Proxy登陆S4 Public Cloud，希望了解相关流程和注意事项，以及相关成功案例，非常感谢。

entry.title: France Statutory Payment Issue
entry.content: We have a business requirement to populate the SGTXT field information under the <Ustrd> tag based on the 'YA' document type. If the document type other than 'YA' then the value should pick from the 'XBLNR' field. Currently we do not have standard solution from SAP, we would need to create the custom logic.

entry.title: BAdi MMPUR_WORKFLOW_AGENTS_V2 not working for RFQ
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to implement Badi MMPUR_WORKFLOW_AGENTS_V2  for RFQ where we are not able to identify the step Info,

We know it is clearly mentioned in the note 2646400 , do have any anyother way to implement this Badi.

In RFQ we are trying to identify the Agent based on Position ID coming from Successfactor system

entry.title: Statutory Payment Remittance issue - Document type 'YA'
entry.content: We have a business requirement to populate the SGTXT field information under the tag based on the 'YA' document type. If the document type other than 'YA' then the value should pick from the 'XBLNR' field. Currently we do not have standard solution from SAP, we would need to create the custom logic. To apply this condition in the DMEE tree, we don't have standard solution or structure fields available currently in the Public cloud.

entry.title: Statutory Payment Remittance issue - Document type YA
entry.content: We have a business requirement to populate the SGTXT field information under the tag based on the 'YA' document type. If the document type other than 'YA' then the value should pick from the 'XBLNR' field. Currently we do not have standard solution from SAP, we would need to create the custom logic. To apply this condition in the DMEE tree, we don't have standard solution or structure fields available currently in the Public cloud.

entry.title: Inquiry for sales document type in SAP S4 HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAPer,

The user is asking us to create different sales document types for after sales service order including sales service order, free of charge service order, standard service return which are different from OR, CBFD and CBAR.

As I know, the sales document types cannot be copied in cloud system, could you please advise if there is any other standard sales order types to be used for service order?

Thanks.

entry.title: About planning calendar
entry.content: What is the reason that the creation of planning calendars​ is not possible in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud | My Inbox App
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I'm configuring a custom business role named ZBRS_WORKFLOW_MANAGER in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. The purpose of this role is to allow designated users to manage workflow tasks across the enterprise.

To achieve this, I assigned the business catalog Business Process Management - My Inbox (SAP_CA_BC_MYINBOX_PC), which provides the two My Inbox applications required for workflow task management.

However, I have a couple of questions:

1. The business catalog SAP_CA_BC_MYINBOX_PC has 8 dependent business catalogs. Is it recommended to include all of these dependent catalogs in my custom business role, or should I only add them when a specific business scenario requires them?

2. I would like the workflow manager to manage workflow tasks only for a specific company code, instead of all workflow tasks in the system. Is it possible to restrict My Inbox or workflow task management by Company Code?

Thank you for your answer.

QuocDT5

entry.title: Route Determination for One-Time Customers in S/4HANA Public Cloud (EDI sales Orders)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community Members,

We have a business requirement to determine the route automatically during sales order creation via the EDI channel for one-time customers in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

In the standard route determination process, the route is derived based on factors such as the shipping point/departure transportation zone and the customer's transportation zone (ship-to party). However, for one-time customers, no permanent Ship-To Business Partner master data exists, which makes the standard approach difficult to use.

The main challenge is that the destination address varies with every order, so maintaining a fixed transportation zone in the Business Partner master data is not practical. Additionally, since this is an S/4HANA Public Cloud environment, we understand that SAP has restrictions around route determination updates through SOAP APIs.

We have already reviewed the BAdI SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM (Sales Document Item Modification) as a potential extensibility option. However, transportation zone and route fields do not appear to be available for modification within this BAdI.

Has anyone encountered a similar requirement? If so, could you please share how you addressed it? Are there any available extensibility options, workarounds, or alternative approaches to determine the route dynamically for one-time customers in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Any suggestions or experiences would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Material Inventory Values – Balance Summary Report Showing Negative Valuation Quantity
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We are observing a negative stock quantity for material D011002AA-002 in the Material Inventory Values – Balance Summary report, although the actual physical inventory is positive.

Could you please confirm whether there is any standard SAP procedure, correction program, or SAP Note available to correct the negative stock shown in this report?

If this is due to a Profit Center change or any inventory valuation inconsistency, kindly advise the recommended steps to realign the stock and eliminate the negative quantity  and Value from the report.

Please let us know if any additional information is required.

entry.title: xml is not getting accepted in edocument cockpit
entry.content:
<SchematronValidationResult>
<Error>
<ErrorCode>XRECHNUNG-CII-VALIDATION-302</ErrorCode>
<ErrorText>
<totalIssues>3</totalIssues>
<totalErrors>2</totalErrors>
<errors>
<error>
<level>FATAL_ERROR</level>
<message>[BR-DE-1] Eine Rechnung (INVOICE) muss Angaben zu "PAYMENT INSTRUCTIONS" (BG-16) enthalten.</message>
<path>/rsm:CrossIndustryInvoice</path>
</error>
<error>
<level>FATAL_ERROR</level>
<message>[BR-DE-6] Das Element "Seller contact telephone number" (BT-42) muss übermittelt werden.</message>
<path>/rsm:CrossIndustryInvoice/rsm:SupplyChainTradeTransaction[1]/ram:ApplicableHeaderTradeAgreement[1]/ram:SellerTradeParty[1]/ram:DefinedTradeContact[1]</path>
</error>
</errors>
<warnings>
<warning>
<level>WARN</level>
<message>[BR-DE-27] In BT-42 sollen mindestens drei Ziffern enthalten sein.</message>
<path>/rsm:CrossIndustryInvoice/rsm:SupplyChainTradeTransaction[1]/ram:ApplicableHeaderTradeAgreement[1]/ram:SellerTradeParty[1]/ram:DefinedTradeContact[1]</path>
</warning>
</warnings>
</ErrorText>
</Error>
<Result>
<ResultCode>EN16931-CII-validation_V1.3.15</ResultCode>
<ResultText>
<totalIssues>0</totalIssues>
<totalErrors>0</totalErrors>
<errors/>
<warnings/>
</ResultText>
</Result>
</SchematronValidationResult>

Hello Experts,

Even after maintained all details it still not accepted in the edocumnet cockpit

entry.title: Split authorization for posting and reversing supplier invoice
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to allow users to post supplier invoices but prevent them from reversing supplier invoices?

I have been looking into the authorization settings, but it seems that the authorization for posting and reversing supplier invoices cannot be separated.

Could you please confirm whether this is standard system behavior? Is there any workaround?
